name: Liveness Probe Failure
purpose: Liveness Probe 실패로 인한 Pod 재시작 감지
flow: 실패하는 Liveness Probe가 설정된 Deployment 생성
expected_root_cause: Liveness Probe Failure - 헬스체크 엔드포인트 확인

trigger.command:
kubectl apply -f - <<'EOF'
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: test-liveness-fail
  namespace: dockercoins
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: test-liveness-fail
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: test-liveness-fail
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: app
        image: busybox
        command: ["sh", "-c", "sleep 3600"]
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /healthz
            port: 8080
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 5
          failureThreshold: 3
EOF

steps.name: Liveness Probe 실패 확인
steps.pattern: Liveness probe failed|Back-off restarting failed container

root_cause_match.criteria: 근본 원인이 Liveness probe 실패임을 정확히 식별했는가

data_sources.criteria: K8s 이벤트, probe 실패 로그를 활용했는가

causal_chain.criteria: probe 실패 → pod 재시작 → 서비스 불안정 인과관계를 설명했는가

code_analysis.criteria: probe 설정 및 헬스체크 코드를 분석했는가
